title: Arenas, Pools, Slabs, and Fragmentation · Object-Lifetime Lens: Fragmentation Measurement
summary: A game simulation creates millions of short-lived entities and must trade individual release for bounded phase ownership. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem fragmentation measurement increment in instrumented arena and object pool. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure internal and external fragmentation, peak live bytes, reserved bytes, churn, and locality before redesign.
Choose size classes, alignment, page ownership, and internal-fragmentation metrics from workload evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Fragmentation Measurement · Theory Fragmentation Measurement
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 1310. Produce bounded C evidence to maintain checked arena offset and high-water invariants; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Measure internal and external fragmentation, peak live bytes, reserved bytes, churn, and locality before redesign.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Fragmentation Measurement contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Fragmentation Measurement · Theory Fragmentation Measurement.

steps.title: Build Fragmentation Measurement evidence · Theory Fragmentation Measurement
steps.instruction:
For this theory demonstration of cmem-fragmentation-measurement, write the complete compile-ready C program headed "/* Evidence: cmem-fragmentation-measurement-1ruosd */" for changed case 7249. It must maintain checked arena offset and high-water invariants, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails. Keep instant code within the PicoC 3.2.2 practice subset; do not claim C23, optimizing compiler, sanitizer, ABI, thread, operating-system, FFI, load, or production evidence until its explicit controlled transfer gate passes.

Evidence target: Build Fragmentation Measurement evidence · Theory Fragmentation Measurement.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Fragmentation Measurement into observable performance evidence. For Build Fragmentation Measurement evidence · Theory Fragmentation Measurement, keep Fragmentation Measurement connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.
